subject: Zipper the fly from Chip 'n Dale Rescue Rangers, depicted as a small green fly in a red outfit flying aggressively
description: A tiny anthropomorphic fly — green body, large yellow eyes, red outfit — flies forward with one fist raised in an aggressive action pose. The character's posture radiates determination and speed, matching the 'Flying Ranger' subtitle. The background shows a stylized interior environment with blue-purple geometric shapes and a shadowy figure visible in the distance. The framing emphasizes the small creature's outsized confidence.
foreground: Small green fly character in red outfit, fist raised, flying forward
background: Blue-purple geometric indoor environment with shadowy distant figure
emotion: aggressive determination, fist raised, wide stare
